method.comment: /** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_AFTER_WRITE * An object has been written into the database. The modifications can be propagated to other objects. * * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */

/** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_COMPUTE_VALUES * An object needs to be recomputed after changes * * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * Calculate percent usage of power reading * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */

/** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_COMPUTE_VALUES * An object needs to be recomputed after changes * Calaulate Power installed usage and contrated power usage with power reading * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */

/** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_SET_INITIAL_ATTRIBUTES_FLAGS * Set object initial attributes flags. Call cmdbAbstractObject::AddInitialAttributeFlags() for all the initial attributes to be set initially. * * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */

/** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_SET_ATTRIBUTES_FLAGS * Set object attributes flags. Call cmdbAbstractObject::AddAttributeFlags() for all the attributes to be set for this target state. * * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * Contracted power of Rack is Customer Installed Power * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * Collect power reading from Rack for this contract * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * Calculate percent usage of power reading * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */

/** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_COMPUTE_VALUES * An object needs to be recomputed after changes * * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */

/** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_SET_INITIAL_ATTRIBUTES_FLAGS * Set object initial attributes flags. Call cmdbAbstractObject::AddInitialAttributeFlags() for all the initial attributes to be set initially. * * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */

/** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_SET_ATTRIBUTES_FLAGS * Set object attributes flags. Call cmdbAbstractObject::AddAttributeFlags() for all the attributes to be set for this target state. * * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
/** * Calculate percent usage of power reading * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */

/** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_COMPUTE_VALUES * An object needs to be recomputed after changes * * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */

/** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_SET_INITIAL_ATTRIBUTES_FLAGS * Set object initial attributes flags. Call cmdbAbstractObject::AddInitialAttributeFlags() for all the initial attributes to be set initially. * * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */

/** * Event Listener for EVENT_DB_SET_ATTRIBUTES_FLAGS * Set object attributes flags. Call cmdbAbstractObject::AddAttributeFlags() for all the attributes to be set for this target state. * * @param Combodo\iTop\Service\Events\EventData $oEventData Event data object * * @author d.vargas@mon-cto.pro */
